title: Tyler's (TYL) EPL Solution to Improve Greenville Permit Process
text: The implementation of Tyler's (TYL) EPL and EAM solutions will help the city of Greenville in increasing staff productivity and reducing costs, while improving services to the community.

title: City of Greenville, Texas, to Improve Customer Service and Collaboration with Tyler Technologies' Solutions
text: PLANO, Texas--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Tyler Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: TYL) announced it has signed an agreement with the city of Greenville, Texas, for Tyler's Enterprise Permitting & Licensing and Enterprise Asset Management solutions.

title: Tyler (TYL) Improves Electronic Permit Process in Goochland
text: The integration of Tyler's (TYL) Enterprise Permitting & Licensing solution is likely to improve electronic permitting and licensing processes for the Goochland County office and people.

title: Tyler Technologies Named to Dow Jones Sustainability Index North America
text: PLANO, Texas--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Tyler Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: TYL) today announced the company has been named to the Dow Jones Sustainability Index (DJSI) North America in recognition of its commitment to sustainable business practices for the second consecutive year.

title: 4 Business-Software Services Stocks in Focus Despite Industry Woes
text: Zacks Business-Software Services industry players like MSCI, TYL, SNX and PLUS are poised to continue benefiting from the increasing demand for multi-cloud-enabled software solutions amid an accelerated digital transformation and a shift to cloud initiatives.

title: Goochland County, Virginia, Sees Strong Adoption of Tyler Technologies' Enterprise Permitting & Licensing Solution
text: PLANO, Texas--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Tyler Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: TYL) announced that Goochland County, Virginia, has successfully gone live with Tyler's Enterprise Permitting & Licensing (EPL) solution to manage its permitting, planning, and code enforcement.

title: Tyler's (TYL) ERP Suite to Streamline Fairfax City's Operations
text: The implementation of Tyler's (TYL) solutions is likely to modernize the City of Fairfax's enterprise resource planning system and help it streamline all business operations.

title: City of Fairfax, Virginia, Selects Tyler Technologies' Enterprise Resource Planning Solution
text: PLANO, Texas--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Tyler Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: TYL) announced it has signed an agreement with the City of Fairfax, Virginia, for Tyler's Enterprise ERP solution, powered by Munis®. The city will use Enterprise ERP for financial management, purchasing, and human resources and payroll, as well as Tyler's Time & Attendance solution for payroll timekeeping.
